title: SIR-2026 ATAN INBUATSAIHNA KAL ZELAH POLITICAL PARTY HRANG HRANG AIAWH BOOTH LEVEL AGENT (BLA) TE PUALIN SERCHHIP, THENZAWL, E. LUNGDAR LEH N. VANLAIPHAI-AH TE TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
737/2026-2027

Serchhip, the 27th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 atana inbuatsaihna kal zelah Political Party aiawh - Booth Level Agent-te pualin Serchhip District chhunga khaw pali – Serchhip, Thenzawl, East Lungdar leh North Vanlaiphai-ah te training buatsaih a ni.  Training-ah  hian political party hrang hrang aiawhte an tel tha hle a ni.

Training hawnna inkhawm Serchhip-a neiah Election Officer Pi Lalchhanhimi chuan thu sawiin, dik tak leh langtlang (transparent) taka SIR chu kalpui tur a nih thu a sawi a, thlei bik nei lova Electoral Roll-a hming chuang tur dik takte, an inziah luh vek theih nan, Booth Level Agent-te chu an pawimawh hle a ni a ti a. Election Commission of India pawhin a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin   an mawhphurhnate tha taka hlenchhuak theuh turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) & District Level Master Trainer Pu Vanthangpuia'n Serchhip-a BLA Training-ah hian zirtirna a pe a; Thenzawl-ah  chuan Pu K. Lalhlimpuia, ERO-in zirtirna pein, E. Lungdar, N. Vanlaiphai-ah ERO Pi Marilyn Lalruatkimi'n zirtirna a pe bawk.

Training-ah hian Special Intensive Revision thil tum leh inkaihhruaina te, field-level-a enumeration leh verification kalpui dan tur chungchang te, BLO te nena thawh ho dan tur leh thil pawimawh chi hrang hrangte inzirtirna neih a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP-AH PM SURYA GHAR: MUFT BIJLI YOJANA AWARENESS PROGRAMME BUATSAIH A NI
content:
736/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 26thMay 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip Power & Electricity Department chuan Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana chungchangah Awareness Programme, Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall-ah an buatsaih a, mahni in atanga, ni zung chakna hmanga kawlphetha thar chhuah dan chungchang inhrilhhriatna hun hman a ni.

Er. Lalramnghaka, Executive Engineer, P&E Serchhip chuan he Scheme thil tum tiangpui sawiin, India ram puma mimal In (household) vaibelchhe khatah Rooftop Solar System (RTS) bun tum a nih thu a sawi a. Mimal chenna in chunga Solar hmanga power siam chhuah chuan nasa taka Electric Bill a tih hniam mai bakah, hman sen loh power thar chhuah a níh phei chuan, hman bang chu P&E power supply line-thlunzawmah inthawn chhuakin, unit khat zelah Rs 4.73-in P&E department ten an leisak leh thin thu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah Mizoram pumah RTS hmang mi 1086 awmin, Serchhip district-ah mi 13 chauh an la awm thu sawiin, tan lak a ngaih thu a sawi.

P&E Serchhip SDO Pu H. Zoramthanga, Sub Station SDO Pu PC Lalremruata leh Thado Greentech leh Swastik Enterprises ten RTS chungchang sawizauna an nei bawk a. Mizoramah RTS khawl bun thei, Govt. Empanelled Vendor mi 20 vel an awm tawh thu te, sum lama harsatna neite tan Loan hmanga tíh theih a nih thu te, khawl bunna man hi state leh central sawrkarin tumpuiin subsidy thahnem tak an pek thute ngaihthlak niin, Solar Roof Top lo hmang tawhtu Consumer-te hnen atangin RTS an hman hnua Bill an chawi tlem dante leh, RTS ti thar ve duhte tan an tawnhriatte sawina hun hman a ni bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Serchhipa sawrkar department hrang hrang aiawhte, khawtlang hruaitute, NGO leh Consumer te kalkhawmin, chawhnu lamah sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

RTS hi Online-in pmsuryaghar.mizoram.gov.in leh pmsuryaghar.gov.in ahte dil theih a ni a, diltu chu India ram chhunga cheng, electric consumer ngei nih a ngai a; khawl bunna hmun tur hi chenna in-ah ngei a nih a ngai bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: DISTRICT TRANSFORMATION PLAN FOR LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUKHAWM
content:
735/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 27th May, 2026 :Vawiin dar 4:00 PM khan Deputy Commissioner's Office Chamber, Lawngtlaiah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruainain 'District Transformation Plan for Lawngtlai District'  thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Mizoram Sorkar in District-  tin hmasawnna atan  cheng nuai 100 pek a nih thu tarlangin, Deputy Commissioner Office leh Concern department - ten hmasawnna hnathawh  an kalpuk ang a ti. Mizoram sawrkar atanga sum dawn te hmanthat a, thawh that  a nih chuan nakumah hmuh leh tur a ni tih sawiin, tha leh uluk  thei ang bera thawh a pawimawh dawn hle a ni, a ti. Lawngtlai District tana ruahmanna  siamah  a chhawrtu tam thei tur leh hman tangkai thei tur  thlang a pawimawh tiin theihtawp chhuah a nih tur thu a tarlang bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak relho a ni a. Lawngtlai Khawpui lunlai leh kawtthlerah 'Road Signage' dah tur a tih niin, Line Department atangin District Horticulture Department - hnuaiah Farmgate, Collection Unit/Hut Phaikhang Zau (KMMTTP) ah  thawh tur niin, Estimate siam fel tawh a ni a. Education Department- kaltlangin  zirna In  tihchangtlun ni se, a hma lama estimate thehluh thuai ni se an ti a. Lairam Nursing School tan Computer Set -10, Medical Superintendent hnuaiah Mobile Medical Unit - Bolero Camper 4x4 Long Body Modified lei turte, X- Ray Building/ Room Sangau PHC a  sak turte, Public Garbage Disposal - TATA 610 SK Truck pahnih Sanitation Department, LADC tana lei turte, CCTV hi Areopagy -4, AOC -4, Electric Veng- 3, Chandmary-  3 leh Vengpui-3 dah tura tih niin, Studs Light - hi Areopagy,  Bazar venga dah tura tih a ni bawk. District Transformation - atan hian sum hmuh tawh a nih angin  a hma thei ang ber a hmalak leh  hnathawh tan ni se tih a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian  'District Transformation Plan for Lawngtlai District'  Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah District Level Advisory Committee (DLAC) on Safe Food & Healthy Diets an ṭhu khawm
content:
734/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 27:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Level Advisory Committee (DLAC) on Safe Food & Healthy Diets chu an Chairman, Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaiin a hna thawh pindanah an ṭhu khawm.

Lunglei District Designated Officer (Food Safety) Pu John Laldingliana chuan Lunglei District-a food safety chungchanga hma lakna tlangpui tar langin, thu ngaihtuah tur a sawi zau va. Ei leh in hrisel leh thianghlimna kawnga hmasawn theihna tur ruahmanna hrang hrang sawi ho a ni.

He hunah hian ei in siam leh zuarte tan Food Safety Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) hnuaia phalna neih leh inziah luh (Food License & Registration neih) a pawimawh thu leh hemi atan hian Licensing & Registration Camp buatsaih a ṭul thu sawi ho a ni a. Camp hi kumin June thla ral hmain buatsaih ni se, Food & Drugs Administration (FDA) lamin a hun leh hmun tur lo ruahman se, tih a ni a. Hemi chungchang hi Local Council leh YMA te bakah, media kal tlangin a zau thei ang bera puanzar ni se, tih a ni.

Lunglei khawpui chhunga ei leh in zawrhna hmun – restaurant, hotel, street food vendor, office canteen leh ei siamna hmunte'n license & registration an neih leh neih loh te, an ei siam a thianghlim leh thianghlim loh leh FSSAI inkaihhruaina hrang hrang an zawm dan te endik turin Sub-Deputy Commissioner kaihhruaina hnuaiah DLAC-a tel department hrang hrang, Local Council leh YMA ai awhte telna Joint Inspection Team din ni se, tih a ni a. June 2026 ral hmain endikna hi kalpui ni se, tih a ni.

Ei leh in zawrhna dawr thianghlimna leh hriselna kawnga ti ṭhate tan, "Food Safety & Hygiene Excellence Award" siam ṭha tih niin, Joint Inspection Team te endikna beh chhanin lawmman dawng thei tur thlan ni se, tih a ni a. FDA-in ei leh in endikna lirthei, Food Safety On Wheels (FSW) an neih kal tlangin ei leh in thianghlim leh thianghlim loh endik theih a nih thu tar lan niin, hemi chungchanga mipui zirtirna peng khat atan "I Kawtkaiah Sawrkar" hun hmannaah FSW Demonstration & Testing Camp kalpui tel ni se, tih a ni.

Ei leh in siam leh zuarte'n thianghlimna leh ei in bawm leh chhinchhiahna bel (labeling) chungchanga FSSAI inkaihhruaina dan an hriat theih nan hriat tur pawimawhte a zau thei ang bera puanzar leh inzirtir ni se, tih a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Saitualah District Level Committee on Vibrant Village Programme-II (VVP-II) thutkhawmna neih a ni
content:
733/2026-2027

Saitual, the 27th May 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, District Level Committee on Vibrant Village Programme-II (VVP-II) chu an Chairperson leh District Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thu khawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Pu V. Laldinsanga, Project Director leh Member secretary ni bawk chuan Vibrant Village Programme-II (VVP-II) atana Village Action Plan hrang hrangte PPT hmangin a sawifiah a, District Level Committee on VVP chu 3rd September 2025 ah din a nih tawh thu sawiin, Saitual District chhunga VVP II kalpui tur khua thlan bik  Mimbung, Hrianghmun, Teikhang, Kawlbem leh Chiahpuite chu enfiah a nih tawh thu leh portal ah dah luh an nih tawh thute a sawi bawk. Ngopa RD Block-ah BDO kaihhruaina hnuaia Block level study team hnathawh hrang hrangte chu a tar lang bawk. Heng khua 5 hmasawnna atan hian vaibelchhe 15 chu ruahman a nih thu a tarlang a, committee member te chuan ngun taka an ngaihtuah hnuah he ruahmanna hi an pawm a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pu Srinivas Sadi, District level on Vibrant Village Programme-II (VVP-II) chairperson & DC in a kai hruai a, Pu V. Laldinsanga, PD & Member Secretary, Pu Jacob Hlychho, Addl SP, Pu Samuel Malsawmzuala, BDO, Ngopa, Pu R. Vanlalfaka , SDC, te bakah VVP II District Level Committee Memberte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Supreme Court chuan ECI-in SIR a kalpui thei tih a nemnghet; hemi chungchanga thubuai thehluh chu a hnawl
content:
732/2026-2027

27th May, 2026:Vawiin khan India rama Court sang ber, Supreme Court chuan Election Commission of India (ECI) in a bik taka electoral roll ennawnna, “Special Intensive Revision” (SIR) an kalpui thei tih a nemnghet a, Article 324 hnuaiah ECI hian inthlanna felfai leh dik taka an kalpui theihna turin thuneihna zau tak an nei tih a sawi.

He thubuai hi Bihar-a SIR kalpui dan chungchangah thehluh a ni a. Thubuai thehluttu Petitioner-te chuan ECI-in an thuneihna huang pelin, vote nei tawh sa reng te chu vote nei tlak an nihzia tichianga, nemnghet nawn leh turin a nawr a, hei hi dan kalh a ni, tiin, mi tam takin vote thlak theihna dikna chanvo an neih chu a chhuhsak a ni, an ti.

Amaherawhchu, Supreme Court chuan Article 324 hian ECI chu thuneihna zau tak “plenary power” a pe a, chu thuneihna chuan inthlanna dik leh felfai kalpui theihna tura hmalakna pawimawh zawng zawng, elector roll ngun taka ennawn thlengin a huam tel a ni, a ti.

Court chuan thubuai thehluttute thu thlen, Parliament-in election chungchanga Dan a siam tawh hnuah ECI-in thuneihna a nei tawh lo a ni, tih an sawi chu a hnawl a. Court chuan ECI thuneihna leh Parliament Dan siamte hi inkalh loa, inhne rem taka kal dun tur an ni, a ti a. ECI-in Parliament Dan siam a kalh tur a ni lo a, Parliament Dan siam hmangin ECI thuneihna (constitutional mandate) “tihbosak emaw che theiloa siam (extinguish or paralyse) ” theih a ni hek lo tih Court chuan a sawi a ni.

Supreme Court chuan Representation of the People Act, 1950-a Section 21(3) pawh a hrilhfiah a. He section hian ECI-in dik leh tha an tih anga electoral roll ennawn thei turin thuneihna zau tak a pe a ni, a ti. Court ngaihdanah chuan he provision hian dik leh felfai taka inthlanna buatsaih kawngah daltu leh tikhawlo theitu apiang hmachhawn turin a tul anga inpawhfan theihna (flexibility) a pe a ni, a ti.

Court chuan ECI-in tawp chin neilo thuneihna an nei bik lo tih a sawi chian rualin, India Danpui leh Parliament rorelna kalhin hma an la thei bik chuang lo a ti a. Amaherawhchu, thubuai thehluttuten SIR-in dan a kalhna lai Court hmaah chiang takin an lantir thei lo, tiin an thubuai thehluh chu a hnawl a ni.

Court chuan Article 324 hi “living constitutional power” a ni a, Dan awmsa nen inkalh loa hman a nih chuan Election Commission chu mipui sawrkar - democracy thianghlimna humhim turin chakna leh theihna a pe a ni, a ti.

title: Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga FOCAM conference hmanpui
content:
731/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 27th May,2026:Vawiin khan Aijal Club-ah Former Councillors’ Association of Mizoram Municipalities (FOCAM) inkhawmpui vawi 6-na neih niin, Art & Culture Minister Pu C.Lalsawivunga chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hun pawimawh takah hian FOCAM member kalkhawmte hmaah khuallian Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan thusawiin, ram thatna tur ngaihtuah leh hmasawnna kawnga ke pen chu mitin mawhphurhna a ni a ti a, inthliarbikna awm lova thawhho a tul tih sawiin, hemi kawngah FOCAM chu hmasawnna atana pawl tangkai tak leh inlungrual tak a nih thu a sawi bawk. Minister chuan mipuite’n hmasawnna an duh a, Municipality leh Corporators-te mawhphurna chu mipuiin an hrechiang chho mek a, Corporators-te chu Aizawl hmasawnna fawng vuantu pawimawh tak an nih thu tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian FOCAM chu corporator-te a tul huna puitu ni thei tura inhawng turin a chah bawk. Minister chuan Aizawl chu plan mumal awm lova din niin, hmasawnna tur leh siamthat ngai tam tak awm mahse, thlen chin atanga hmasawnna lam kawng zawh a, Aizawl chu India mai ni lo, ram dang mite pawhin ram nuam leh chenna tlak an tih ni tura tan la zel turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih bawk. Khawpui chhunga mi rethei leh chan chhe zawkte dinhmun chu veiawm a tih thu a sawi a, mi chan chhe zawkte chawikanna hna hi ram hruaitu kutah dah mai lovin, mahni theihna kawngah theuh hma la turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a, mitin tan hmasawnna thlen thei turin ram hruaitute chu thawhpui zel turin a sawm bawk a ni. Minister chuan Municipality tih hmasawnna tura sum awm: Urban Local Body grant, fees chi hrang hrang etc-te chu dik taka hmang turin FOCAM kaltlangin a sawm a, eiruknain a tihbuai loh municipality tha leh rintlak ni turin a chah bawk.

FOCAM Meeting ah hian Dan siamthat chu an agenda pui ber a ni a. Pu P.C Lalhmingthanga, FOCAM Secretary chuan FOCAM-in Pawl thiltum leh dinchhan 7-a neih thu sawiin member 38 - an awm mek tih a sawi a. FOCAM hian Mizoram-a Municipal awmte huam thinin Councillor ni tawhte a tel theih vek thin a, vawiin a Dan siamthat hnuah chuan Aizawl Municipal Corporation a Coun-cillor/Corporator-te chauh a huam tawh dawn a, Pawl hming pawh FORMER CORPORATORS' ASSOCIATION OF AIZAWL MUNICIPAL CORPORATION (FOCAM) ti a thlak a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Aizawl khawpui chhunga City Bus Pick and Drop kalpui dan tur chungchanga Mizoram State Transport Authority thuchhuah
content:
730/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 27 May 2026:State Transport Authority, Mizoram chuan Aizawl khawpui chhunga mipui, Aizawl City bus hmang thinte leh Bus neitute tan awlsam leh awmze nei zawka Pick and Drop kalpui a nih theih nan a hnuaia mi ang hian thuchhuah a siam:

1. Aizawl City Bus te an stand ah rei tak ding lova, passenger luh leh chhuah hun chhung chiah din tirin, Pick & Drop System chu Sept 2025 atanga Oct 2025 inkar chhung khan enchhinna hlawhtling takin lo kalpui tawh a ni a.

2. Hemi chungchang hi State Transport Authority Meeting ni 04.02.2026-a neih chuan a ngaihtuah a. Aizawl khawpui chhunga bus a chuang thin te tan a that em avang leh ACBOA lam pawhin kalpui zel tha an tih avangin Pick & Drop System hi Aizawl khawpui chhungah kalpui chhunzawm nise tiin a rel a.

3. June ni khat, 2026 atanga thu leh awm hma chu Aizawl khawpui chhunga City Bus te chu an stand-ah rei tak ding tawh lovin, passenger luh leh chhuah hun chhung chiah an ding tawh tur a ni a. He thil hi mipui hmakhaw ngaia ruahman a nih ang ngeiin, mipuite pawhin lo zawm a, lo hmang tangkai thin turin an ngen a ni.

title: GREEN MIZORAM DAY 2026 HMAN DAN TUR RELIN LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON GREEN MIZORAM THUKHAWM
content:
729/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 27th May 2026 :June Ni 11, 2026 - a Green Mizoram Day- hman dan tur relin vawiin khan 'Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Green Mizoram' chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan 'Green Mizoram Day' chu Kum 1999 atanga kum tin hman thin a nih angin kuminah pawh urhsun taka hman a tul hle a ti a. Khawvel sik leh sa inthlak danglam zelah thing leh mau bakah nungchate humhalh leh venhim kawngah thanharh a hun tawh tak zet tiin, Department pakhat kutah engkim dah theih a ni lo a, sawrkar, NGO leh mipuite tanho zel a pawiwh tak zet a ni, a ti. Lawngtlai District- a ramngaw enkawl kawngah neitu thinlungput a tul hle tih tarlangin Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai District mipuite thing leh mau, ramngaw humhalh kawnga theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm nghal bawk.

hutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. Green Mizoram Day- puala inkhawm hi DC Office kawtzawlah hman a ni ang a, Khuallian atan Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, CEM,LADC niin, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chu Chairman a ni ang. Hemi ni vek hian Bawrhsap kawtzawla hun hman zawhah thing tiak phun leh ni se tih a ni a, Department leh NGO - te thingphun tur bituk sak nghal niin, thingtiak- 420 phun ni se an ti a ni. Thingtiak- hi Kawlchaw bul, NH- 02 kawngpui dungah phun a ni ang. Thing phun enkawl chungchangah a phuntu department - te kutah dah niin, kum khatah vawi hnih- September leh February- ah a hmunhma samfai thin ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian 'Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Green Mizoram' Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Kumin 'Green Mizoram Day' hi June Ni 11 ah hman a ni dawn a, Thupui atan 'Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni (Trees are green gold, The roots of all life)' tih hman a ni ang.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah All Mizoram Farmers' Union General Assembly 2026 hman a ni
content:
728/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 27th May 2026:Vawiin khan Thangtea Hall, Kahrawt Veng, Champhaiah All Mizoram Farmers' Union (AMFU) General Assembly 2026 hman a ni a, Champhai Addl. DC Pu Lalbiakfela chu khuallian a ni.

Khuallian Pu Lalbiakfela chuan AMFU hnathawh hi a tha hle a ni tih a sawi a, farmer te hi kan ram tungdingtute niin an tel lo hian Mizoramin hma a sawn theih a rin loh thu a sawi a. Champhai District-a farming leh agriculture lama hmalakna hrang hrang, sawrkar scheme leh policy-a hna kal mek te a sawi a, farmer te hnathawh that zarah Champhai chu sawhthing an thar hnemin an hralh hnem thei tih sawiin farmer te an fakawm hle a ni tih a sawi a. He General Assembly hi hlim taka hmang turin a chah a, an hnathawh zelna tura duhsakna hlanin Mizoram hmasawnna thlentu ni zel turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

General Assembly hi hun hniha then a ni a, hun khatnaah hian AMFU General Headquarters President Pu Chhuanvawra'n a kaihruai a, AMFU General Headquarters General Secretary Pu Lalhmachhuana'n report pein inhmelhriattirna hun a hmang a. AMFU General Headquarters Sr. Vice President Pu H. Taithuama chuan thu a sawi a, Vice President Pu H. Thangtluanga'n lawmthu sawiin hun khatna a khar.

Hun hnihna hi Vice President Pu PC Lalzirliana'n a kaihruai a, assembly rorel neih niin hruaitu inthlanna neih nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT - AH VOHBIKTE TANA HMUNHMA BUATSAIH DAN (BARRIER FREE ENVIRONMENT FOR PwD)CHU COMMISSIONER, PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES HOVA ULUK TAKA ENFIAH A NI
content:
727/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 27th May of 2026:Vawiin khan Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo, Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities (PwD) chuan Mamit khawpui huamchhunga sawrkar hmunhma hrang hrang Mamit DC Office, District Hospital Mamit, Govt. Mamit College, Govt. Mamit High School, Govt. Mamit Higher Secondary School leh DPC Office, Samagra-te tlawhin, rualbanlote (vohbikte) tana awlsam zawka luh chhuah theihna (Access Audit) an siam dan te a hmunah a enfiah.

Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo, Commissioner chuan, vohbikte chuan ngaihsak an mamawh bik thu sawiin, Pianphunga rualbanlote'n pangngai taka nun an hman ve theih nan, a tulna apiangah kan tanpui a ngai a ni a ti. Vawiina fuke kim tha tak te pawh hi nakinah chuan ramtuileilova la awm thei reng kan nih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar laipui duh dan angin, sawrkar pisa-ah te, zirna inah te, Biak In leh vantlang mipui punkhawmna hmunah te rualbanlote (vohbikte) tana hman awlsam tur hmunhma kan buatsaih a tul hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Mizoramah pawh Office of the Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities hmalaknain ni 21 February, 2025 atang khan Access Audit hi neih tan a ni a. Mamit District chhung office endik bakah hian mizoram chhung district 10 ah he programme hi kalpui tawh niin, Mizoram pumpuiah endikna hi neih chhuah vek tum a ni.

Sawrkar laipui chuan India rama rualbanlote hamthatna tura a duan Accessible India Campaign hnuaiah Access Audit hi a ngai pawimawh em em a. Rualbanlote'n khawi hmun pawh harsa lova an thlen ve theih nan - wheelchair hmangte, mitdelte leh a dangte tan, mipui punkhawmna vantlang building hrang hrang, Biak In, sawrkar pisa, zirna in leh a dangte chu siam rem ngei ngei tur tiin khauh takin thupek a siam a. Hemi bawhzui hian Audit Team te leh rualbanlo aiawhte'n heng hmunte hi endikin hun an hmang thin a, India ram pumpuiah Access Audit hi chak taka kalpui mek a ni.

Vawiina Access Audit neihnaah hian rualbanlote'n khawilai hmun pawh awlsam taka an thlen theih nan wheelchair hman ngaihna hmunte, mitdelte tana braille tarna hmun siamte, mipui punkhawmna vantlang building hrang hranga an kalvelna tur te endik a ni a. Hmunhma buatsaih dan tur ruahmanna (drawing) hlan nghal an ni bawk. He Access Audit neihnaah hian Pi Lalrammuani Hnamte, SDC bakah Line Department aiawhte a tel a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER REVIEWS 132 MW TUIVAI HYDROELECTRIC POWER PROJECT
content:
116/2026-2027

Aizawl, 27 May 2026:Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma today chaired a review meeting at his office on the 132 MW Tuivai Hydroelectric Power Project. The meeting was attended by Power Minister Pu F. Rodingliana and officials of the Power & Electricity Department.

The Detailed Project Report (DPR) for the Tuivai Project has already been completed, and the project is now ready for tendering. Efforts are currently underway to implement the project under the Public-Private Partnership (PPP) mode.

At present, Mizoram’s peak power demand stands at 182 MW. According to the 20th Electric Power Survey, the state’s peak power demand is projected to rise to around 213 MW by the year 2030. The State Government currently has an installed power generation capacity of 50.20 MW, though actual generation remains considerably lower. As a result, only about 10 percent of the state’s total power requirement is generated within Mizoram.

The state spends approximately Rs. 64,954.45 lakh annually on power purchases, excluding transmission charges. In view of this, the Government considers the expansion of local power generation capacity to be a matter of great importance.

The Tuivai Hydroelectric Project was initially surveyed by the Central Water Commission in 1992 with an estimated generation potential of 210 MW. However, as part of the proposed dam area would extend into Manipur State, the project was subsequently re-surveyed and redesigned. A revised Detailed Project Report has now been prepared for a 132 MW power generation capacity.

According to the DPR, the project is estimated to cost Rs. 2,289.50 crore and is targeted for completion within five years. The meeting also decided that the annual financial requirements for implementation of the project would be examined in consultation with the Finance Department.

Apart from the Tuivai Project, the meeting also reviewed the ongoing Tuirini Project and works being carried out under the Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme (RDSS). Discussions were further held on issues to be taken up with the Union Power Minister during his forthcoming visit to Mizoram.

title: 132 MW TUIVAI POWER PROJECT CHUNGCHANG CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN SAWIHO
content:
726/2026-2027

Aizawl the 27th May 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hovin a office-ah 132 MW Tuivai Hydroelectric Power Project chungchang Power Minister Pu F. Rodingliana leh P&E thawktuten an sawiho.

Tuivai hi DPR siam zawh tawh a ni a, tender tihchhuah theih a ni tawh a, PPP Mode-a kalpui tura tinzawn a ni.

Tun dinhmuna Mizoram power mamawh hi a san lai berin 182 MW a ni a, 20th Electric Power Survey chhut danin kum 2030 ah khian Mizoram power mamawh zat tur hi a san lai berin 213MW vel ni tura chhut a ni. Tunah hian state sorkar hian power siam theihna (installed capacity) hi 50.20 MW kan nei mek a, a tak taka an siamchhuah zat phei chu a tlem lehzual a. A mamawh zawng zawng zaa sawm (10%) vel chauh tharchhuak ang a ni a. Kum khata power lei nana Mizoram sum sen ral hi transmission charge tel lovin Rs. 64,954.45 lakh vel a ni. Hei vang hian Mizoramin power siamchhuahna tam zawk a neih hi thil tul tak nia ngaih a ni.

Tuivai hi kum 1992 ah Central Water Commission chuan 210MW pe chhuak thei turin a lo survey tawh a. Nimahsela, tui hian Manipur state chhung a chim tel dawn avangin Survey hi a thara kalpui leh a ni a. Megawatt 132 pe chhuak thei tura duan that niin Detailed Project Report hi peih a lo ni ta a ni.

DPR ang chuan hna hi kum nga chhunga thawh zawh tur leh Rs. 2289.50 Crore senna tura duan a ni.

Hna kalpui tur a kumtina sum leh pai sen ngai zat turte Finance Department nena enho tura tih a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Tuivai Project bakah Tuirini Project kalpui mek te leh RDSS hnuaia hnathawh mek te an sawi a. Union Power Minister-in Mizoram a rawn tlawh huna Mizoram mamawh lo sawipui tur chite pawh an sawiho a ni.

title: Pu C.Lalsawivunga’n Dungtlang hmunhlui Archeological Excavation Carbon Dating Result a puang
content:
725/2026-2027

27th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Art & Culture Minister Pu C.Lalsawivunga chuan a pisaah, Art & Culture Department hmalaknaa Champhai District, Dungtlang khaw bula hmunhlui zirchianna atanga carbon sample an lakchhuah result a puang.

North Eastern Council atangin Art &Culture Department chuan he zirchianna kalpuina tur sum a dawng a. Department of History, Higher and Technical Institute, Mizoram (HATIM) nen tangkawpin kum 2024 May thla atang khan zirchianna leh archaeological excavation kalpui tan niin carbon sample an lak chhuah te chu Beta Analytic, Florida, USA-ah test a ni a. He zirchianna atanga a lan danin tum li(4) lai Dungtlang khaw hmun hluiah mihring an lo cheng tawh tih a hriat theih a ni. Mihring lo awm tawhna kumte hi 410-1830 A.D. inkar a ni a. Heng kumte hi carbon dating hmanga chhut chhuah an ni.

Tianhrang thlan atangin ruhro pawh laihchhuah a lo ni tawh bawk a. Beta Analytic, Florida, USA atang thovin kum 1740-1800AD hunlai a mi a ni tih lo nemngheh a ni tawh bawk.

Dungtlang hmunhlui hi kum inchhangbung zatin an luah lo tih a hriat theih a, luah loh kum kar awl pawh kum engemaw chen a awm a ni. Testing dang kalpui mek niin, chanchin kimchang zawk hriat theih thuai beisei a ni.

He result puanna programme tawi buatsaihah hian Art & Culture Pu C Lalsawivunga chuan Mizo hnam rohlu leh hmun hluite, Art & Culture Department lamah report nachang hre tur leh, tichhe lo leh venghim turin Mizoram mipuite a sawm a ni.

He project buaipuitute hi archaeologist pahnih Pu Vanlalhuma Singson (Art & Culture Dept.) leh Dr. Lalhminghlua, Asst. Prof. (Dept. of History, HATIM) te an ni a. Vawiin programme-ah hian anni bakah Art & Culture Department official te leh Dungtlang khaw mi leh sate an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District Level Committee for Encloser of Work under MGNREGA thukhawm
content:
724/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 27th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall-ah, Hnahthial District Level Committee for Encloser of Work under MGNREGA chu an Chairman leh District Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K. Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin an thukhawm a. He hunah hian MGNREGA hnuaia hna zawhfel theih loh la awmte hmalak dan tur chungchang ngaihtuah ho a ni.

Thutkhawmna koh a nih chhan sawiin District Rural Development Office, Project Director Pu HD. Lalpekmawia chuan July ni khat atangin Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (VB-G RAM G) hman tan a nih tawh dawn thu leh hemi hma hian MGNREGS hnathawh mek la fel lo awmte chingfel tura thukhawm an nih thu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah hian hnathawh zawh vek tawh, sum leh pai pawh pek chhuah vek tawh si, Management Information System (MIS) lam, technical thil avanga complete theih loh hna pariat (8) a la awm thu a tarlang a. Heng te hi District Level Committee for Encloser of Works under MGNREGA hian an ngaihtuah tur a nih thu sawiin VB-G RAM G-ah hian department dang nena thawhhona tur convergence pawh a tam tur thu a tarlang bawk.

He hunah hian District Level Committee for Encloser of Work under MGNREGA Convener, District Programme Officer, MGNREGA, Block Development Officer, Divisional Forest Officer, District Horticulture Officer leh District Soil Conservation Officer te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Memorandum regarding austerity measures for achieving economy in government expenditure. Dated 27th May, 2026
